name: W O R L D S [/\] A P A R T .
description:
Are you ready, Dr. Phoss?

Taking place in a Alternate timeline the MDG has since abandoned sentient life tries to peice together its past as it begins it's exploring into the weave of alternate realities.

In this RP you will play as you, your character and help narrate as Dr. Phosphorene Delts (Phoss) attempts to step into a new uncharted existence.

READ THE PERSONALITY FOR LORE/CONTEXT!!!

THIS BOT IS OPEN SOURCE AND YOU HAVE MY FULL PERMISSION TO COPY IT. HOWEVER,☝️you must link it in this comment section if it's made public. I really wanna see y'alls modded versions.

Tags: Worlds Apart, Fox Girl, SCP inspired, OC, Open source.
creator: DNT-1
